title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 108.1020 - Bonds exempt from taxation
text:
108.1020.  Bonds exempt from taxation. — Build America bonds and any recovery zone bonds issued by the state of Missouri or an entity described in subdivision (4) of subsection 1 of section 108.1000 and the interest thereon shall be exempt from all taxation by the state of Missouri and its political subdivisions.
(L. 2009 H.B. 191)
